name: python3-reportbug
title: python3-reportbug
summary: Python modules for interacting with bug tracking systems
description:
Python modules for interacting with bug tracking systems
reportbug is a tool designed to make the reporting of bugs in Debian
and derived distributions relatively painless.
.
This package includes Python modules which may be reusable by other
tools that want to interact with the Debian bug tracking system.
.
To actually report a bug, install the reportbug package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-reportbug because Python modules for interacting with bug tracking systems.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-reportbug as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-reportbug with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-reportbug --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
